title: Outlook / Email Client Setup on a New Device
text:
Q: How do I set up Outlook or my email client on a new device?
A: To set up Outlook or your email client on a new device, follow these steps for your respective operating system:

Windows:
1. Open Outlook from the Start menu or desktop shortcut.
2. If prompted, select 'Next' to start the setup wizard.
3. Choose 'Email Account' and click 'Next'.
4. Enter your name, email address, and password in the provided fields.
5. Click 'Next' and Outlook will test your account settings. If successful, click 'Finish'.
6. If prompted, restart Outlook to complete the setup.

macOS:
1. Open Outlook from the Applications folder or Dock.
2. If prompted, select 'Add Account'.
3. Choose 'Exchange' or 'Other' depending on your email type and click 'Continue'.
4. Enter your email address and password, then click 'Add Account'.
5. Outlook will attempt to configure your account automatically. If successful, click 'Done'.
6. If you need to enter additional settings, follow the prompts to complete the configuration.

For both systems, ensure you have your email credentials handy, including your username and password. If you encounter any issues, please contact the IT helpdesk for further assistance.
